title: CNV Pilot - Subject Candidate Contact Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b2okc","text":"This protocol details the manner in which candidate subjects for the CNV pilot study will be contacted for recruitment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Make a first phone call to the candidate using the IRB-approved phone script
Send an e-mail and physical mailer to the candidate using the IRB-approved e-mail template and the IRB-approved mail template
creator: Brian Britt
